summary: Iteration 107: Tested Review-first Recruitment Page UX. All 10 features verified working correctly. RecruitmentPage.js shows 'Review Applicant' as PRIMARY solid button, 'View Blockers/Approve Recruitment' as SECONDARY outline button. Cards display approval readiness summary (Blocked by X items / Ready for approval). Navigation correctly goes to /portal/recruitment/:id. EmployeeProfilePage shows 'Applicant Profile' banner with 'Recruitment Review' badge when in recruitment context. Sidebar correctly highlights 'Recruitment' when viewing applicant.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Review-first Recruitment UX fully implemented. Key data-testids: recruitment-page, applicant-card-{id}, review-applicant-btn-{id}, approve-btn-{id}, blockers-dialog, approval-confirm-dialog, confirm-approve-recruitment-btn, pipeline-stage-{status}. RecruitmentPage.js at /app/frontend/src/pages/portal/RecruitmentPage.js. EmployeeProfilePage.js shows recruitment context banner at lines 2569-2583 when isRecruitmentView=true and person_stage='applicant'.

review_applicant_primary_button.details: 'Review Applicant' button is styled as PRIMARY (solid bg-primary) on each applicant card

approve_secondary_button.details: 'Approve Recruitment' or 'View Blockers' button is styled as SECONDARY (outline/ghost variant)

approval_readiness_summary.details: Cards show 'Blocked by X items' or 'Ready for approval' with Progress: X/Y

back_to_recruitment_link.details: 'Back to Recruitment Pipeline' link shown when viewing applicant from recruitment context

applicant_profile_banner.details: 'Applicant Profile' banner with 'Recruitment Review' badge shown in recruitment context

sidebar_highlighting.details: Recruitment sidebar item highlighted (bg-primary text-white) when viewing /portal/recruitment/:id

view_blockers_dialog.details: Clicking 'View Blockers' opens dialog showing blocking items (Right to Work, Proof of Address, References, etc.)

overflow_menu_options.details: Overflow menu shows 'Review Full Profile', 'View Compliance File', 'View Recruitment Record'

pipeline_stage_filtering.details: Pipeline stage cards (New, Screening, Interview, Compliance Review) are clickable for filtering

console_errors_noted: 404 on employment-mismatch endpoint (unrelated to recruitment UX, pre-existing issue)
